NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ACCRUED WHEN PLAINTIFF DISCOVERED THE TRAILER WAS SOLD.
